overview: Sports Edge is a complete, professional sports merchandise e-commerce platform. Shop for Football, Cricket, Basketball, Tennis, and Badminton gear with a seamless shopping experience including cart, wishlist, order tracking, and an admin dashboard for store management.
features: Product catalog with 12+ sports merchandise items across Football, Cricket, Basketball, Tennis, and Badminton
User authentication with role-based access (customer and admin)
Shopping cart with quantity management and total calculation
Simulated checkout with UPI, Card, and Net Banking payment options
Order placement and order history with real-time status tracking (Placed > Processing > Shipped > Delivered)
Review and rating system (1-5 stars per product)
Admin dashboard with product CRUD, order management, user management, and sales analytics
Advanced product search and filters by sport, brand, and price range
Contact page with store address, email, and Instagram details
Professional dark navy, forest green, and white sports-themed UI with hero banner
Fully responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile
